hidden_state.scenario_summary: Synthetic mixed-evidence case where service degradation symptoms and unexpected billing signals co-occur without enough evidence to commit to a single root cause.
latent_facts: Operational and commercial signals are both present, but the evidence is incomplete.
The case should stay conservative and route for review.
likely_failure_modes: Model overcommits to a confident root cause despite unresolved evidence.
Model promises a service credit or invoice correction before the case is confirmed.

case_packet.title: Synthetic ambiguous mixed-evidence case 2

notes: Customer has raised both operational and billing concerns in the same thread.

pricing_notes: Invoice preview includes 18 burst GPU-hours above commitment.
Customer also asked for a fresh invoice PDF copy.

usage_record.telemetry_summary: Status page reported degraded performance while some jobs appeared stalled intermittently.
anomalies: Queue depth elevated during the same period as the customer complaint.

incident_record.customer_impact_summary: Some runs stalled and throughput dropped.
incident_record.engineering_summary: Engineering saw signs of service degradation, but incident evidence is not yet sufficient to confirm a single cause.

case_packet.customer_note: We saw degraded performance, but now billing also looks off. Can you help us understand what is actually going on?
case_packet.policy_snippet: Do not apply a contractual remedy until incident classification and billing variance are both confirmed.
case_packet.calculator_output: Invoice preview reflects 18 burst GPU-hours. No explicit remedy is triggered from current calculator output.
case_packet.visible_case_summary: Synthetic mixed-evidence case spanning degraded runtime behavior and unexpected billing signals.

adjudication_notes: Ambiguous cases should preserve uncertainty and avoid overclaiming a remedy.
ground_truth.reference_customer_note: We found mixed evidence across the incident and billing records, so we are routing this for further review before giving you a final commercial answer. We will follow up once the incident classification and billing context are confirmed.
ground_truth.reference_internal_note: Owner: shared_revops_engineering. Action: hold_for_engineering_review because the root cause remains unknown, confidence is low, and both service symptoms and billing surprise are present.
